corrected_fields.summary: This source is an ECB research agenda index page listing broad areas of institutional research interest including microprudential policy, central bank liquidity and collateral frameworks, bank supervision, and fintech/digital currencies. It provides no specific policy decisions, data releases, or actionable market information. This is a non-archiveable listing page per Rule 6.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This source has no immediate market relevance. It is a navigational index of ECB research priorities rather than a published policy paper, data release, speech, or event. It cannot be used for trading decisions or market analysis. Per verification rules, listing pages must be rejected.
